'''''Flan''''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that was present at [[Goff Platform]] during [[Attack on Goff|the Imperial attack there]]. it was destroyed along with the rest of the defense force.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
